education.description: Pursuing B.Tech in Computer Engineering. Active in hackathon culture, research publication, and student leadership.
Graduated with distinction. Held the highest student leadership position (General Secretary) in final year.

professional.description: Completed a full-stack web development internship, gaining hands-on experience with web technologies and production workflows.
highlights: Developed and deployed full-stack web features
Gained exposure to industry workflows and client requirements

leadership.description: Leading the hackathon organizing body at VIIT Pune, responsible for organizing large-scale national-level hackathon events.
highlights: Leading end-to-end hackathon event planning and execution
Coordinating with sponsors, mentors, and participants

leadership.description: Served as Technical Co-Head for VIIT's flagship hackathon, overseeing technical operations and participant experience.
highlights: Managed technical infrastructure for hackathon events
Coordinated judging panels and problem statement design
Mentored participating teams throughout the event

leadership.description: Held the highest student leadership position at DKTE Polytechnic. Responsible for overseeing council activities, coordinating between students and administration, and leading major college events.
highlights: Highest student leadership position in the institution
Coordinated between student body and administration
Led major college events and cultural initiatives
Awarded 'Student of the Year – Best Outgoing Student' for this term

awards.title: Student of the Year – Best Outgoing Student
awards.description: Awarded for outstanding academic performance, leadership, and contributions to the institution.

awards.title: 1st Rank – Crackers 2.0, Advitya, and Orionet
awards.description: Secured first rank across three inter-collegiate competitions in the same academic year.
